name: ft-tracklink
description: F1 Track Linker - Forge JIRA app for linking track sections to issues

scripts.build: npm run type-check && npm run build:track-viewer
scripts.ci: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.forge:deploy: npm run build && forge deploy -e development
scripts.upload-svg: tsc scripts/upload-svg.ts --outDir scripts --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck && node scripts/upload-svg.js
scripts.upload-geojson: tsc scripts/upload-geojson.ts --outDir scripts --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck && node scripts/upload-geojson.js
